person.name: Malise 5th Earl of Strathearn
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Máel Ísu or Malise II; died 1271 is the fifth known mormaer, or earl, of the Scottish region of Strathearn. He was the son of Robert, 4th Earl of Strathearn.

«b»Biography«/b»
Malise first appears on record in 1244, when he promised to observe the Treaty of York, the signing of which had been witnessed by his father. By this treaty, the King of Scots had dropped his claims to the northern shires of England. He was present in parliament from 1244 to 1245, and took part in the coronation of King Alexander in 1249. He was a friend of King Henry of England, and was tasked by him to attend his daughter Margaret, when she became Queen of Scots as the wife of Alexander. In 1259 he obtained safe conduct from King Henry to go abroad, and had returned the following year.

Malise was an intelligent figure who managed to retain the favor of both the Scottish and English kings. Said to have been "munificent above all his compatriots", he was also much noted for his generosity. Throughout his life he made considerable gifts to Inchaffray Abbey, giving the monks command of several of his serfs, and the right to take stone from the quarry of Nethergask, as well as donating several monetary sums.

«b»Death and burial«/b»
Malise is believed to have died in 1271, while in France. His body was brought back to Scotland, and he was buried at Dunblane Cathedral, the religious centre of Strathearn. In 1817, during reconstruction of Dunblane Cathedral, two sarcophagi were discovered with life-size effigies of a warrior and his lady. Since the fourteenth-century chronicler John of Fordun had recorded Dunblane as the burial site of Malise, these were determined to be the tombs of Malise and his countess, though which one is uncertain. It was marked with the date 1271. In addition, Sir Robert Sibbald once mentioned that in the late 17th century, there was a picture in the church which represented the Countess of Strathearn and her children kneeling for a blessing to St. Blane, though its whereabouts today are unknown.

«b»Marriages and children
Earl Malise married four times:«/b»

Firstly, around 1245, to Marjory de Muschamp, daughter and coheiress of Sir Robert de Muschamp by his wife Isabel. They had two daughters:

1.) Muriel, born before 1245, married William, Earl of Mar

2.) Mary, born before 1249, married Sir Nicholas de Graham of Dalkeith and Abercorn.

Secondly, before December 1257, Matilda, daughter of Gilbert, Earl of Orkney and Caithness. They had two sons and one daughter:

1.) Malise III, Earl of Strathearn, who succeeded him

2.) Robert

3.) Cecilia

Thirdly it appears he married a woman named Emma, though her parentage is unknown and they evidently had no issue.

Fourthly, in or after 1265, he married Maria, daughter of Ewan, Lord of Argyll and widow of Magnus, King of Mann. She survived Earl Malise and married Sir Hugh Abernethy, by whom she was the mother of Alexander Abernethy.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Malise 5th Earl of Strathearn於大約1225年出生在英國蘇格蘭培爾盧維 卡素時，他的父親Sir Robert Sinclair 4th Earl Of Strathearn51歲，母親Matilda de Moravia48歲。他於大約1244年與Margery de Muschamp在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1271年11月23日在法國享年47歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭斯林史爾登布藍登布藍 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Malise

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Vito, Salvatore, Gaetano, Angelo, Antonio, Domenic, Sal, Aniello, Attilio, Carlo, Carmela, Concetta.
Italian (Sicily and Naples): perhaps from Arabickhalīṣ ‘pure, sincere’.

en.lifeSummary: When Malise 5th Earl of Strathearn was born about 1225, in Ruthven Castle, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Robert Sinclair 4th Earl Of Strathearn, was 51 and his mother, Matilda de Moravia, was 48. He married Margery de Muschamp about 1244, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died on 23 November 1271, in France, at the age of 47, and was buried in Dunblane Cathedral, Dunblane, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Malise 5th Earl of Strathearn est né environ 1225, à Ruthven Castle, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert Sinclair 4th Earl Of Strathearn, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Matilda de Moravia, avait 48 ans. Il a épousé Margery de Muschamp environ 1244, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé le 23 novembre 1271, à France, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Dunblane Cathedral, Dunblane, Stirlingshire, Écosse.

de.Ruthven Castle, Perthshire, Scotland: Ruthven Castle, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Malise 5th Earl of Strathearn um 1225 in Ruthven Castle, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Sinclair 4th Earl Of Strathearn 51 und seine Mutter Matilda de Moravia 48. Er hat um 1244 in Schottland, United Kingdom Margery de Muschamp geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb am 23. November 1271 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Frankreich und wurde in Dunblane Cathedral, Dunblane, Stirlingshire, Scotland begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Malise 5th Earl of Strathearnが約1225年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアルスベン カストルで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Sinclair 4th Earl Of Strathearnは51歳，母Matilda de Moraviaは48歳であった。約1244年にイギリススコットランドでMargery de Muschampと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1271年11月23日にフランスで47歳で死去し，スコットランドスティルリングシュアイアダンブランダンブラン カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Malise 5th Earl of Strathearn(이)가 대략 1225년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 루스븐 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Sinclair 4th Earl Of Strathearn(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda de Moravia(은)는 48세였다. 그는 대략 1244년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Margery de Muschamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1271년 11월 23일 프랑스에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 던블랜 던블랜 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Malise 5th Earl of Strathearn nasceu aproximadamente 1225, em Ruthven Castle, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Robert Sinclair 4th Earl Of Strathearn, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Matilda de Moravia, tinha 48 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery de Muschamp aproximadamente 1244, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de novembro de 1271, em França, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Dunblane Cathedral, Dunblane, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

ro.Ruthven Castle, Perthshire, Scotland: Ruthven Castle, Perthshire, Scoția, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Malise 5th Earl of Strathearn родился около 1225 г. в местности рутвен кастл, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Sinclair 4th Earl Of Strathearn было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Matilda de Moravia, 48. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery de Muschamp около 1244 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер 23 ноября 1271 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности дунблан кэтедраль, дунблан, стирлингшир, Шотландия.

Se casó con Margery de Muschamp aproximadamente 1244, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió el 23 de noviembre de 1271, en Francia, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Dunblane Cathedral, Dunblane, Stirlingshire, Scotland.
